$comment: Design token file for the Empty State component
$description: Full-screen centered feedback state shown when no content is available (393px mobile viewport). Two container types (illustration or icon) and three sizes (Small, Medium, Large). Anatomy: an icon/illustration container, a content block (title + optional sub-text), and an optional actions row. Illustration-container tokens are intentionally omitted. The primary and secondary actions are nested Button (HighRise) components and carry their own tokens — only the actions-row gap is defined here.

background.description: Screen background behind all content - gray/0 - #ffffff

gap.description: Vertical gap between the icon container, content block, and actions row - md - 12px

background.description: Muted background behind the placeholder icon - gray/50 - #f9fafb

border-radius.description: Rounded-square corner radius of the icon container - md - 8px

small.description: Inset padding around the icon in the Small size - 2xs - 8px

medium.description: Inset padding around the icon in the Medium size - xs - 10px

large.description: Inset padding around the icon in the Large size - sm - 12px

small.description: Icon container width and height in the Small size - xl - 48px

medium.description: Icon container width and height in the Medium size - 2xl - 56px

large.description: Icon container width and height in the Large size - 3xl - 64px

small.description: Icon width and height inside the Small container - 2xl - 32px

medium.description: Icon width and height inside the Medium container - 3xl - 36px

large.description: Icon width and height inside the Large container - 4xl - 40px

gap.description: Vertical gap between the title and the sub-text - 3xs - 4px

align.description: Text alignment of the content block - center

typography.description: Primary heading communicating the empty-state reason - body/semibold/2xl - 16px Semibold, 24px line-height
Supporting description below the title - body/regular/base - 14px Regular, 20px line-height

gap.description: Horizontal gap between the secondary and primary action buttons - md - 12px
